_README: Crypto exit/risk config from synthetic-data Optuna optimization (see config/optimized_profiles.json for full analysis + caveats). Auto-loaded by config/settings.py via load_optimized_params(). Precedence: env var > data/user_settings.json (dashboard) > THIS FILE > code default.
